说明: 周晓：本班班长；成绩好、责任心强，偶尔在走廊或办公室帮老师传话。学生向配角。

固化.画风与质量: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, ultra detailed, depth of field, 8k uhd
固化.身材与体态: teen girl, slim, small breasts, student body, natural proportions
固化.容貌与发型: asian, brown eyes, black hair, medium ponytail, neat schoolgirl look, no heavy makeup, fair skin, 17 years old, aged up high school student, not child
固化.气质与年龄感: serious student, class monitor, polite, diligent, school uniform vibe, not loli

服装固化._注释: cg.py 按此顺序拼成固定 outfit tags，置于 cg_scene 之前；LLM 严禁在 cg_scene 中重写服装
服装固化.上衣: school blazer, white dress shirt, red neck ribbon bow, modest
服装固化.配饰: small hair clip, student id lanyard
服装固化.锁定约束: fully clothed, consistent outfit, same clothes, school uniform

场景固化._注释: 每张 CG 都会加在 cg_scene 之后，固化画风氛围，不含服装
场景固化.通用: cinematic lighting, film grain, bokeh, professional photography, high detail face, perfect detailed eyes, realistic iris and pupils
